## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences on what changed and why. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (rule, skill, tool, doc, infra)
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Configuration / template (`config/*.example.yaml`, `.env.example`, etc.)
- [ ] Breaking change (existing users will need to update something)

## Testing

<!-- How did you validate this change? Be specific.
     For Python tools: which scripts ran clean? For rules/skills: did you exercise the workflow end-to-end against `jane-demo` data?
     For docs: did you verify links / commands actually work as written? -->

- [ ] Tested locally against `jane-demo` data (or a fictional dataset)
- [ ] Forbidden-token grep passes (no real PII / real company names / real PATs introduced)
- [ ] `.env.example` updated if a new env var was introduced
- [ ] Docs updated if user-facing behaviour changed

## Checklist

- [ ] Followed the conventions in `docs/CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] No personal/private data in any tracked file
- [ ] Commit message starts with `<scope>:` (e.g., `M14:`, `docs/SETUP.md:`, `tools/resume-tailor:`)
